scope: Evaluate Binance Alpha due-diligence CEX wallet aggregation records as a discovery source and prevent CEX-internal transfers from being counted as new exchange inflow.

screenshot.visible_module: CEX 钱包归集资金动态

semantic_conclusion.verified_plus_sign_meaning: the Gate destination wallet received tokens in both reconstructed samples
semantic_conclusion.generalization_limit: The two Gate samples do not prove the meaning of every Binance Alpha Hot Wallet row.
semantic_conclusion.source_role_limit: The two current EOA senders are unlabeled; Gate deposit, sweep, user, project, market-maker, and unrelated-source roles remain unresolved.
semantic_conclusion.trade_direction_limit: The receipts prove transfer direction into Gate. Economic external inflow, sender ownership, sale intent, and later execution remain unresolved without source linkage, next-hop, or quote-recovery evidence.

unlabeled_to_cex_inflow_candidate.rule: A verified token transfer into a configured CEX destination can enter the existing supply-risk gate while source entity, economic external inflow, sale intent, and next hop remain unresolved.

external_to_cex_inflow.rule: Keep the existing threshold and action gate after receipt, token, direction, and destination role are verified.

cex_internal_aggregation.rule: Do not count deposit or runtime sweep to hot-wallet movement as a second economic inflow; internal aggregation metrics are gross transfer turnover and may repeat the same economic tokens across hops.

alpha_custody_movement_unresolved.rule: Keep Alpha Router, Custody, Rebalance, external-to-custody, and unverified Alpha Hot Wallet movement outside buy or sell actions.

evidence_layers.official: Binance due-diligence UI discovery, Binance announcement, public Alpha token list, and official Alpha API reference.
evidence_layers.onchain: BSC transaction, receipt, Transfer log, block timestamp, token decimals, and destination-address reconstruction.
evidence_layers.market: The screenshot contains a point-in-time price display; no market action is derived from it in this review.
evidence_layers.social: No KOL or community claim is promoted into the runtime decision.
evidence_layers.inference: Path roles and runtime effects are assigned only after official discovery and on-chain direction are separated.

remaining_gates: Open the three Binance Alpha Hot Wallet TXID links in the app and preserve the exact hashes.
Verify receipt status, token contract, from/to, decimals, wallet labels, and same-path deduplication for each hash.
Keep entity ownership, sale intent, next hop, and quote recovery unresolved until direct evidence exists.
Window-start balances remain outside ordered FIFO attribution.
Window aggregation for multiple individually sub-threshold transfers sent directly to already configured CEX addresses remains unimplemented.
